key_concepts: Machine learning models cannot handle raw text labels.
Nominal categories have no inherent order.
Ordinal categories have a meaningful ranking.
High-cardinality features contain too many unique levels, requiring specialized processing.

definitions.definition: Kategori yang memiliki makna hierarki urutan secara logis.
Fitur yang menampung variasi kategori level unik dalam jumlah sangat besar.

examples: Nominal: city names like Jakarta, Bandung, Surabaya.
Ordinal: clothing sizes like Small, Medium, Large.
High-cardinality: Zip codes, user IDs, or IPs.
